events.description: Final deep-dive in series (task-052..061). Building factories + cultural variants. Found 19 verified findings: B-1 critical (walls bypass lockstep entirely), B-2 dormant (chapel PIDs collide with Forest/Rock), B-5 high (BuildType enum missing 8+ IDs — half cultural roster unbuildable via UI), B-6 medium (Shrine footprint mismatch). Cultural building coverage matrix shows 8 player-facing buildings have no UI path. Deep-dive series complete: 10 audit tasks (052-061), ~140 verified findings.
